name: Fair Finance Loans
description_short: Texas-based installment lender offering signature loans up to $1,200 with flexible repayment terms and credit reporting to build payment history.
description_long:
Fair Finance Company has operated in San Antonio, Texas for over 50 years as a local installment lender serving customers with varying credit profiles. The company explicitly positions itself as an alternative to payday loans, offering signature installment loans rather than short-term cash advances or collateral-based products.

Fair Finance provides personal installment loans up to $1,200 with repayment terms of up to 12 months and payments starting as low as $31.50. Applicants can apply online, by phone, or in-person at their San Antonio location. The company reports payment history to national credit bureaus, allowing borrowers to build or rebuild credit through on-time payments. They advertise same-day or next-day funding once approved and claim to accept applicants regardless of credit score.

The company differentiates itself by explicitly rejecting payday lending practices, emphasizing longer repayment periods and lower costs than payday alternatives. They offer a referral program ($20 credit per approved friend), flexible payment methods (in-person, mail, phone), and special discounts for repeat customers. The company is regulated by the Texas Office of Consumer Credit Commissioner and staffs Spanish-speaking representatives.

While Fair Finance addresses a genuine need for accessible credit, the website does not disclose APR, finance charges, or total cost of borrowing. The maximum loan amount of $1,200 is relatively modest compared to broader personal loan markets. No independent verification of their "5-star" reviews or their actual approval rates for poor-credit applicants is available from the website alone.

As a financial institution, this lender competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders in the consumer lending space. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths to improvement. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing visibility into credit health, and credit counseling through nonprofit agencies can help consumers create sustainable budgeting plans. Many of these lenders offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments over 12 to 60 months, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Explicitly not a payday lender—offers installment repayment over months rather than lump-sum repayment with one-time fees
Reports payment history to national credit bureaus to help build or rebuild credit
Same-day or next-day funding after approval
Low minimum payment ($31.50) and flexible repayment up to 12 months
$20 referral bonus per approved friend and discounts for repeat customers
50+ year operating history in San Antonio market
cons: No APR or total finance charge disclosed on website—borrowers cannot compare true cost before applying
Maximum loan amount of $1,200 is modest and may not meet larger cash needs
Only physical location in San Antonio, Texas—not available in other states or fully remote
No third-party verification of claimed '5-star reviews' or actual approval rates for poor-credit applicants
Soft credit inquiry claim ('no impact to your credit') not substantiated with details about how approval process works
best_for: Texas residents needing $500–$1,200 in cash with flexible repayment over several months
Borrowers with poor or limited credit history seeking to build payment history and credit score
Customers wanting an installment loan alternative to payday loans or short-term cash advances
diagnosis: Fair Finance is best for Texas residents with poor or limited credit who need $500–$1,200 and can repay over 3–12 months. The main caveat is that APR and total finance charges are not disclosed online, making it impossible to verify whether rates are truly lower than payday alternatives or competitive with other installment lenders—applicants must call or visit to learn actual costs.
services: In-person application at San Antonio branch
Same-day or next-day funding after approval
Credit bureau reporting for payment history
Loan renewal and repeat customer discounts
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1543 W Summit Ave., San Antonio, TX 78201
